generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that while we're debating civil defense budgets, foreign adversaries are actively undermining our preparedness? My neighbor's family was caught completely unprepared when local emergency systems failed during the last regional crisis. We can't afford to be complacent. Basic preparedness isn't about fear - it's about responsible citizenship. #CommunitySafety #PreparedNotScared
